name: bioethics_model_based_triage_tool_begins_oakline_tru_loy
premise: A clinical ethics consult is running concurrent with treatment decisions where consent capacity and harm tradeoffs are unclear. A clinical ethics consult is running concurrent with treatment decisions where consent capacity and harm tradeoffs are unclear. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: bioethics model based triage tool begins oakline tru. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A whistleblower tip has reached a reporter; silence reads as cover-up, while a rushed statement reads as recklessness. Telemetry and logs are diverging; the SOC lead will freeze writes in twelve minutes if no accountable owner signs off. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident. Treat unverified telemetry as hypothesis; do not assert facts you cannot support from retained logs.

agents.name: Arjun Kaur
agents.identity: I am Arjun Kaur, the accountable decision-maker on this Bioethics bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Amina Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Amina Kowalski, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Arjun Kaur must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Arjun Kaur do?
